---
title: "mermaid-figure-1"
format: pdf
cache: true
---

This will render a figure in fig-causal-cache/latex called mermaid-figure-1.png. I just copied it to figs/, but that can be automated. 

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-causal
%%| fig-cap: "How constituent demand, capacity, political environment, and member's strategic choices shape interbranch representation activities"
%%| fig-width: 6.5
%%| fig-height: 6
%%| out-width: "100%"

flowchart TD
    subgraph demand_g ["Demand"]
        CD["Constituent<br/>Demand"]
    end
    subgraph capacity_g ["Capacity"]
        IR["Institutional Resource<br/>Allocation"]
        SC["Member's Staff<br/>Capacity"]
        MK["Member's<br/>Experience"]
    end
    subgraph env_g ["Environment"]
        PE["Political<br/>Environment"]
    end
    subgraph strategic_g ["Strategic Choices"]
        G["Member's Strategic<br/>Choices"]
        SA["Member's <br/> Staff Allocation"]
    end
    subgraph output_g ["Outputs"]
        W["Work Done by<br/>Congressional Office"]
        L["Legislation"]
        A["Interbranch Representation"]
        C["Communications"]
    end

    CD --> W
    PE --> G
    IR --> SC
    SC --> SA
    G --> W
    G -.-> SA
    MK --> W
    SA -.-> W
    W --> L
    W --> A
    W --> C
    C -.-> CD

    classDef output fill:#E69F00,stroke:#8A5F00,color:#1A1200;
    classDef demand fill:#56B4E9,stroke:#27607F,color:#04222F;
    classDef capacity fill:#009E73,stroke:#005A42,color:#00150F;
    classDef environment fill:#CC79A7,stroke:#7A4664,color:#2B0E1F;
    classDef strategic fill:#F0E442,stroke:#8A8020,color:#2B2800;
    class W,L,A,C output;
    class CD demand;
    class IR,SC,MK capacity;
    class PE environment;
    class G,SA strategic;

    style demand_g fill:#FBFBF9,stroke:#888780,color:#2C2C2A;
    style capacity_g fill:#FBFBF9,stroke:#888780,color:#2C2C2A;
    style env_g fill:#FBFBF9,stroke:#888780,color:#2C2C2A;
    style strategic_g fill:#FBFBF9,stroke:#888780,color:#2C2C2A;
    style output_g fill:#FBFBF9,stroke:#888780,color:#2C2C2A;
```
